failure_message: Qwen3-VL + POPE limit=8 smoke was blocked before execution.

failed_commands.command: python -m stable_core.cli run-landmark --model qwen3_vl_2b_instruct --benchmark pope --limit 8 --instrumentation none

root_cause_hypothesis: project_config/models.yaml has qwen3_vl_2b_instruct path set to null, so the model path gate cannot pass.
project_config/benchmarks.yaml has pope path set to null, so the benchmark path gate cannot pass.
project_config/server.yaml keeps runner_mode local_only and RemoteRunner.submit intentionally returns needs_attention.
recommended_next_action: Configure approved local model and POPE benchmark paths without committing secrets or large artifacts.
Add offline validation for Qwen3-VL config/tokenizer/processor files and POPE sample inventory.
Implement a structured run-landmark or equivalent controlled runner entry point with manifest/log preservation.
Keep real GPU execution disabled until validation-only gates pass and operator approval is explicit.
do_not_continue_reason: Continuing would require inventing model/benchmark paths or bypassing structured runner gates, which would violate the task safety rules and could fabricate benchmark results.
